initial_candidates.sql:
WITH yearly_sales AS (
    SELECT 
        c_customer_sk,
        c_customer_id,
        c_first_name,
        c_last_name,
        c_preferred_cust_flag,
        d_year,
        SUM((ss_ext_list_price - ss_ext_wholesale_cost - ss_ext_discount_amt + ss_ext_sales_price)/2) AS store_total,
        SUM((cs_ext_list_price - cs_ext_wholesale_cost - cs_ext_discount_amt + cs_ext_sales_price)/2) AS catalog_total,
        SUM((ws_ext_list_price - ws_ext_wholesale_cost - ws_ext_discount_amt + ws_ext_sales_price)/2) AS web_total
    FROM customer
    JOIN store_sales ON customer.c_customer_sk = store_sales.ss_customer_sk
    JOIN date_dim ON store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
    JOIN catalog_sales ON customer.c_customer_sk = catalog_sales.cs_bill_customer_sk AND store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = catalog_sales.cs_sold_date_sk
    JOIN web_sales ON customer.c_customer_sk = web_sales.ws_bill_customer_sk AND store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = web_sales.ws_sold_date_sk
    WHERE d_year IN (2001, 2002)
    GROUP BY c_customer_sk, c_customer_id, c_first_name, c_last_name, c_preferred_cust_flag, d_year
),
customer_yearly AS (
    SELECT 
        c_customer_sk,
        c_customer_id,
        c_first_name,
        c_last_name,
        c_preferred_cust_flag,
        MAX(CASE WHEN d_year = 2001 THEN store_total END) AS store_2001,
        MAX(CASE WHEN d_year = 2001 THEN catalog_total END) AS catalog_2001,
        MAX(CASE WHEN d_year = 2001 THEN web_total END) AS web_2001,
        MAX(CASE WHEN d_year = 2002 THEN store_total END) AS store_2002,
        MAX(CASE WHEN d_year = 2002 THEN catalog_total END) AS catalog_2002,
        MAX(CASE WHEN d_year = 2002 THEN web_total END) AS web_2002
    FROM yearly_sales
    GROUP BY c_customer_sk, c_customer_id, c_first_name, c_last_name, c_preferred_cust_flag
),
filtered_customers AS (
    SELECT 
        c_customer_sk,
        c_customer_id,
        c_first_name,
        c_last_name,
        c_preferred_cust_flag
    FROM customer_yearly
    WHERE store_2001 > 0 AND catalog_2001 > 0 AND web_2001 > 0
      AND store_2002 > 0 AND catalog_2002 > 0 AND web_2002 > 0
      AND catalog_2002 / store_2002 > catalog_2001 / store_2001
      AND catalog_2002 / web_2002 > catalog_2001 / web_2001
)
SELECT 
    c_customer_id,
    c_first_name,
    c_last_name,
    c_preferred_cust_flag
FROM filtered_customers
ORDER BY c_customer_id, c_first_name, c_last_name, c_preferred_cust_flag
LIMIT 100;

WITH year_total AS (
  SELECT
    c_customer_sk,
    c_customer_id,
    c_first_name,
    c_last_name,
    c_preferred_cust_flag,
    d_year,
    SUM((ss_ext_list_price - ss_ext_wholesale_cost - ss_ext_discount_amt + ss_ext_sales_price)/2) AS store_sales_total,
    SUM((cs_ext_list_price - cs_ext_wholesale_cost - cs_ext_discount_amt + cs_ext_sales_price)/2) AS catalog_sales_total,
    SUM((ws_ext_list_price - ws_ext_wholesale_cost - ws_ext_discount_amt + ws_ext_sales_price)/2) AS web_sales_total
  FROM store_sales
  JOIN customer ON ss_customer_sk = c_customer_sk
  JOIN date_dim ON ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
  WHERE d_year IN (2001, 2002)
  GROUP BY c_customer_sk, c_customer_id, c_first_name, c_last_name, c_preferred_cust_flag, d_year

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    c_customer_sk,
    c_customer_id,
    c_first_name,
    c_last_name,
    c_preferred_cust_flag,
    d_year,
    SUM((cs_ext_list_price - cs_ext_wholesale_cost - cs_ext_discount_amt + cs_ext_sales_price)/2) AS store_sales_total,
    SUM((cs_ext_list_price - cs_ext_wholesale_cost - cs_ext_discount_amt + cs_ext_sales_price)/2) AS catalog_sales_total,
    SUM((ws_ext_list_price - ws_ext_wholesale_cost - ws_ext_discount_amt + ws_ext_sales_price)/2) AS web_sales_total
  FROM catalog_sales
  JOIN customer ON cs_bill_customer_sk = c_customer_sk
  JOIN date_dim ON cs_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
  WHERE d_year IN (2001, 2002)
  GROUP BY c_customer_sk, c_customer_id, c_first_name, c_last_name, c_preferred_cust_flag, d_year

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    c_customer_sk,
    c_customer_id,
    c_first_name,
    c_last_name,
    c_preferred_cust_flag,
    d_year,
    SUM((ws_ext_list_price - ws_ext_wholesale_cost - ws_ext_discount_amt + ws_ext_sales_price)/2) AS store_sales_total,
    SUM((ws_ext_list_price - ws_ext_wholesale_cost - ws_ext_discount_amt + ws_ext_sales_price)/2) AS catalog_sales_total,
    SUM((ws_ext_list_price - ws_ext_wholesale_cost - ws_ext_discount_amt + ws_ext_sales_price)/2) AS web_sales_total
  FROM web_sales
  JOIN customer ON ws_bill_customer_sk = c_customer_sk
  JOIN date_dim ON ws_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
  WHERE d_year IN (2001, 2002)
  GROUP BY c_customer_sk, c_customer_id, c_first_name, c_last_name, c_preferred_cust_flag, d_year
),
customer_year_totals AS (
  SELECT
    c_customer_sk,
    c_customer_id,
    c_first_name,
    c_last_name,
    c_preferred_cust_flag,
    SUM(CASE WHEN d_year = 2001 THEN store_sales_total ELSE 0 END) AS s2001_store,
    SUM(CASE WHEN d_year = 2001 THEN catalog_sales_total ELSE 0 END) AS s2001_catalog,
    SUM(CASE WHEN d_year = 2001 THEN web_sales_total ELSE 0 END) AS s2001_web,
    SUM(CASE WHEN d_year = 2002 THEN store_sales_total ELSE 0 END) AS s2002_store,
    SUM(CASE WHEN d_year = 2002 THEN catalog_sales_total ELSE 0 END) AS s2002_catalog,
    SUM(CASE WHEN d_year = 2002 THEN web_sales_total ELSE 0 END) AS s2002_web
  FROM year_total
  GROUP BY c_customer_sk, c_customer_id, c_first_name, c_last_name, c_preferred_cust_flag
),
filtered_customers AS (
  SELECT
    c_customer_sk,
    c_customer_id,
    c_first_name,
    c_last_name,
    c_preferred_cust_flag,
    s2001_store,
    s2001_catalog,
    s2001_web,
    s2002_store,
    s2002_catalog,
    s2002_web
  FROM customer_year_totals
  WHERE s2001_store > 0 AND s2001_catalog > 0 AND s2001_web > 0
    AND s2002_store > 0 AND s2002_catalog > 0 AND s2002_web > 0
    AND s2001_catalog / s2001_store > 1
    AND s2001_catalog / s2001_web > 1
    AND s2002_catalog / s2002_store > 1
    AND s2002_catalog / s2002_web > 1
)
SELECT
  c_customer_id,
  c_first_name,
  c_last_name,
  c_preferred_cust_flag
FROM filtered_customers
JOIN customer USING (c_customer_sk)
ORDER BY c_customer_id, c_first_name, c_last_name, c_preferred_cust_flag
LIMIT 100;

initial_candidates.sql:
WITH year_total AS (
  SELECT 
    c_customer_sk,
    c_customer_id,
    c_first_name,
    c_last_name,
    c_preferred_cust_flag,
    d_year,
    SUM((ss_ext_list_price - ss_ext_wholesale_cost - ss_ext_discount_amt + ss_ext_sales_price)/2) AS store_sales,
    SUM((cs_ext_list_price - cs_ext_wholesale_cost - cs_ext_discount_amt + cs_ext_sales_price)/2) AS catalog_sales,
    SUM((ws_ext_list_price - ws_ext_wholesale_cost - ws_ext_discount_amt + ws_ext_sales_price)/2) AS web_sales
  FROM store_sales
  JOIN date_dim ON store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
  JOIN customer ON store_sales.ss_customer_sk = customer.c_customer_sk
  JOIN catalog_sales ON customer.c_customer_sk = catalog_sales.cs_bill_customer_sk AND store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = catalog_sales.cs_sold_date_sk
  JOIN web_sales ON customer.c_customer_sk = web_sales.ws_bill_customer_sk AND store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = web_sales.ws_sold_date_sk
  WHERE d_year IN (2001, 2002)
  GROUP BY c_customer_sk, c_customer_id, c_first_name, c_last_name, c_preferred_cust_flag, d_year
),
filtered AS (
  SELECT 
    t1.c_customer_sk,
    t1.c_customer_id,
    t1.c_first_name,
    t1.c_last_name,
    t1.c_preferred_cust_flag
  FROM year_total t1
  JOIN year_total t2 
    ON t1.c_customer_sk = t2.c_customer_sk 
    AND t1.d_year = 2001 
    AND t2.d_year = 2002
  WHERE t1.store_sales > 0 
    AND t1.catalog_sales > 0 
    AND t1.web_sales > 0
    AND t2.store_sales > 0 
    AND t2.catalog_sales > 0 
    AND t2.web_sales > 0
    AND (t1.catalog_sales / t1.store_sales) > 1
    AND (t2.catalog_sales / t2.store_sales) > 1
    AND (t1.catalog_sales / t1.store_sales) > (t1.web_sales / t1.store_sales)
    AND (t2.catalog_sales / t2.store_sales) > (t2.web_sales / t2.store_sales)
)
SELECT 
  c_customer_id,
  c_first_name,
  c_last_name,
  c_preferred_cust_flag
FROM filtered
ORDER BY c_customer_id ASC, c_first_name ASC, c_last_name ASC, c_preferred_cust_flag ASC
LIMIT 100

WITH yearly_sales AS (
    SELECT 
        c_customer_sk,
        c_customer_id,
        c_first_name,
        c_last_name,
        c_preferred_cust_flag,
        d_year,
        SUM((ss_ext_list_price - ss_ext_wholesale_cost - ss_ext_discount_amt + ss_ext_sales_price)/2) AS store_year_total,
        NULL AS catalog_year_total,
        NULL AS web_year_total
    FROM store_sales
    JOIN customer ON ss_customer_sk = c_customer_sk
    JOIN date_dim ON ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
    WHERE d_year IN (2001, 2002)
    GROUP BY c_customer_sk, c_customer_id, c_first_name, c_last_name, c_preferred_cust_flag, d_year

    UNION ALL

    SELECT 
        c_customer_sk,
        c_customer_id,
        c_first_name,
        c_last_name,
        c_preferred_cust_flag,
        d_year,
        NULL AS store_year_total,
        SUM((cs_ext_list_price - cs_ext_wholesale_cost - cs_ext_discount_amt + cs_ext_sales_price)/2) AS catalog_year_total,
        NULL AS web_year_total
    FROM catalog_sales
    JOIN customer ON cs_bill_customer_sk = c_customer_sk
    JOIN date_dim ON cs_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
    WHERE d_year IN (2001, 2002)
    GROUP BY c_customer_sk, c_customer_id, c_first_name, c_last_name, c_preferred_cust_flag, d_year

    UNION ALL

    SELECT 
        c_customer_sk,
        c_customer_id,
        c_first_name,
        c_last_name,
        c_preferred_cust_flag,
        d_year,
        NULL AS store_year_total,
        NULL AS catalog_year_total,
        SUM((ws_ext_list_price - ws_ext_wholesale_cost - ws_ext_discount_amt + ws_ext_sales_price)/2) AS web_year_total
    FROM web_sales
    JOIN customer ON ws_bill_customer_sk = c_customer_sk
    JOIN date_dim ON ws_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
    WHERE d_year IN (2001, 2002)
    GROUP BY c_customer_sk, c_customer_id, c_first_name, c_last_name, c_preferred_cust_flag, d_year
),
aggregated_sales AS (
    SELECT 
        c_customer_sk,
        c_customer_id,
        c_first_name,
        c_last_name,
        c_preferred_cust_flag,
        MAX(CASE WHEN d_year = 2001 THEN store_year_total END) AS s2001,
        MAX(CASE WHEN d_year = 2002 THEN store_year_total END) AS s2002,
        MAX(CASE WHEN d_year = 2001 THEN catalog_year_total END) AS c2001,
        MAX(CASE WHEN d_year = 2002 THEN catalog_year_total END) AS c2002,
        MAX(CASE WHEN d_year = 2001 THEN web_year_total END) AS w2001,
        MAX(CASE WHEN d_year = 2002 THEN web_year_total END) AS w2002
    FROM yearly_sales
    GROUP BY c_customer_sk, c_customer_id, c_first_name, c_last_name, c_preferred_cust_flag
),
qualified_customers AS (
    SELECT 
        c_customer_sk,
        c_customer_id,
        c_first_name,
        c_last_name,
        c_preferred_cust_flag,
        s2001, s2002, c2001, c2002, w2001, w2002
    FROM aggregated_sales
    WHERE s2001 > 0 AND s2002 > 0
      AND c2001 > 0 AND c2002 > 0
      AND w2001 > 0 AND w2002 > 0
      AND c2001/s2001 > 1
      AND c2001/w2001 > 1
      AND c2002/s2002 > 1
      AND c2002/w2002 > 1
)
SELECT 
    c_customer_id,
    c_first_name,
    c_last_name,
    c_preferred_cust_flag
FROM qualified_customers
ORDER BY c_customer_id ASC, c_first_name ASC, c_last_name ASC, c_preferred_cust_flag ASC
LIMIT 100

WITH year_total AS (
  SELECT 
    c_customer_sk,
    c_customer_id,
    c_first_name,
    c_last_name,
    c_preferred_cust_flag,
    d_year,
    SUM((ss_ext_list_price - ss_ext_wholesale_cost - ss_ext_discount_amt + ss_ext_sales_price)/2) AS store_sales,
    SUM((cs_ext_list_price - cs_ext_wholesale_cost - cs_ext_discount_amt + cs_ext_sales_price)/2) AS catalog_sales,
    SUM((ws_ext_list_price - ws_ext_wholesale_cost - ws_ext_discount_amt + ws_ext_sales_price)/2) AS web_sales
  FROM store_sales
  JOIN date_dim ON store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
  JOIN customer ON store_sales.ss_customer_sk = customer.c_customer_sk
  JOIN catalog_sales ON customer.c_customer_sk = catalog_sales.cs_bill_customer_sk AND store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = catalog_sales.cs_sold_date_sk
  JOIN web_sales ON customer.c_customer_sk = web_sales.ws_bill_customer_sk AND store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = web_sales.ws_sold_date_sk
  WHERE d_year IN (2001, 2002)
  GROUP BY c_customer_sk, c_customer_id, c_first_name, c_last_name, c_preferred_cust_flag, d_year
),
filtered AS (
  SELECT 
    t1.c_customer_sk,
    t1.c_customer_id,
    t1.c_first_name,
    t1.c_last_name,
    t1.c_preferred_cust_flag
  FROM year_total t1
  JOIN year_total t2 
    ON t1.c_customer_sk = t2.c_customer_sk 
    AND t1.d_year = 2001 
    AND t2.d_year = 2002
  WHERE t1.store_sales > 0 
    AND t1.catalog_sales > 0 
    AND t1.web_sales > 0
    AND t2.store_sales > 0 
    AND t2.catalog_sales > 0 
    AND t2.web_sales > 0
    AND (t1.catalog_sales / t1.store_sales) > 1
    AND (t2.catalog_sales / t2.store_sales) > 1
    AND (t1.catalog_sales / t1.store_sales) > (t1.web_sales / t1.store_sales)
    AND (t2.catalog_sales / t2.store_sales) > (t2.web_sales / t2.store_sales)
)
SELECT 
  c_customer_id,
  c_first_name,
  c_last_name,
  c_preferred_cust_flag
FROM filtered
ORDER BY c_customer_id ASC, c_first_name ASC, c_last_name ASC, c_preferred_cust_flag ASC
LIMIT 100
